taxRateNote: Reduced from $1.55 to $1.535 per $100 for 2026. Municipal portion only.
sourceLabel: City of Saint John 2026 General Fund Operating Budget (Approved)
dataStatusNote: Transcribed from the City of Saint John 2026 General Fund Operating Budget (Approved). The City publishes 8 service-area totals; some of those (Growth & Community Services, Public Works & Transportation Services) bundle planning + recreation + parks together, so they're split here based on line-item detail in the budget book.

nativeDepartments.name: Public Safety Services — Saint John Police Commission (own municipal force)
Public Safety Services — Fire, EMO and PSCC (incl. Street Lighting, Water Supply & Hydrants)
Roads, snow, sidewalks, surface maintenance, pedestrian/traffic (portion of Public Works & Transportation Services)
Saint John Transit (Transit Debt + Transit Subsidy)
Solid Waste Management
Stormwater
Fleet Stockroom + Parking (Admin, Peel Plaza, Market Square, Off Street)
Funded by the separate Saint John Water Utility Fund (paid on the water bill, not property tax)
Landscape — Parks & Open Spaces + Rockwood Park + Urban Forestry + SJ Horticultural Assoc. (from Public Works & Transportation)
Arena, Sportsfield, Other Facilities Operation & Maintenance (from Public Works & Transportation)
Library, City Market, Aquatic Centre, Arts Centre, Imperial Theatre, TD Station, Lord Beaverbrook Rink (from Growth & Community)
Market Square + Saint John Trade & Convention Centre
Community Centers, Recreation Programming, Lifeguards, Play SJ, PRO Kids, Arts & Culture Board (from Growth & Community)
Contracted services to YMCA + Boys and Girls Club
Growth & Community Planning Services
Development Engineering, Permitting & Inspection, Minimum Property Standards, Dangerous and Vacant Building, Heritage Conservation
Growth Department + Saint John Industrial Parks
Regional Economic Development Agency
Housing — Affordable Housing Strategy + Housing Accelerator Program + Housing For All
Animal Control + Community Development + Neighbourhood Development
Corporate Services — CAO, Mayor's Office, Common Council, Common Clerk, HR, Legal, Real Estate, Customer Service, Corporate Communications
Strategic Services — Finance, Assessment, Supply Chain, IT, Corporate Planning, Insurance, Liability Insurance
Utilities & Infrastructure Services — Engineering, Facilities Mgmt, City Hall Building, GIS, Stockroom, Carpenter Shop
Other Charges — Fiscal Charges, Landfill Closure, Special Pension Contributions, PILT Adjustment, Transfer to Capital Reserves, Capital from Operating
Regional Services Commission + Unspecified Grants + Local Immigration Partnership + Building Incentive Reserve (residual)
